targets.expr:
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))

scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"})+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"})))
sum(sum (rate (container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}[1m])) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node))
sum(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node))
sum(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_ack_aliyun_com!=""}) by (node))
targets.legendFormat: Alibaba Cloud ECS CPU Request resource requests:

targets.expr: sum(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_ack_aliyun_com=""}) by (node))
sum(sum (rate (container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!=""}[1m])) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_ack_aliyun_com=""}) by (node))
sum(sum(machine_cpu_cores) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node))

sum(sum (rate (container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}[2m])) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node))

/

sum(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node))

panels.description: This metric is memory working set, which is cluster scheduler relay on.

targets.expr: sum(sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node)) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024

sum(sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_ack_aliyun_com=""}) by (node)) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024
sum(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node)) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024
sum(sum(machine_memory_bytes) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node)) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024

sum(sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node))

/ 

sum(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{}) by (node))

panels.title: Memory resource usage

panels.description: This metric is GPU Memory with ACK GPU-Exporter V2, which is cluster scheduler relay on.

targets.expr: sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_PROCESS_MEM_USED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName))
sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName))

sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName) 
/ on(NodeName, NamespaceName) sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName) 
* on(NodeName) group_left 
sum(sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (gpu, NodeName)) by (NodeName))

sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_PROCESS_MEM_USED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName) 
/ on(NodeName) group_left 
sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName) )
targets.legendFormat: GPU memory resource utilization (Pod Used / Pod Allocated):

panels.title: GPU Resource Usage

panels.description:
The "Namespace Cost" is estimated by compute resource. Which is calculated by:

Σ(Pod Request/Node Capacity)*EachNodePrice

Warning:
1. This is a estimate data by compute resource.
2. If there is "No Data", please wait for at least one hour.

targets.expr:
sum(

#由于某些namespace可能没有配cpu或内存request，保证结果展示全量的namespace
max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 

#cpu分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="cpu"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
* 

#cpu权重
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*($CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#内存分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

#内存权重
*
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#ECI成本
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(label_replace(pod_current_price, "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)")) by (exported_pod, namespace) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

# GPU节点
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

)

(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#内存分摊成本
+ on(namespace) group_left 
sum(sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics", resource="memory"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name=""}) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

#内存权重
*
scalar((vector($cost_allocation_method) + 1 == 1) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#ECI成本
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(label_replace(pod_current_price, "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)")) by (exported_pod, namespace) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

# GPU节点
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

)
/
scalar(
 sum(node_current_price or pod_current_price) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
)
*
scalar(abs(sum(max(sum($cost_measure)) by (product_code, instance_id)) ))

panels.title: Namespace Cost Allocation-$cost_measure

panels.description:
The "Pod Cost Per Core" is estimated by compute resource. Which is calculated by:
 
Σ(Pod Request/Node Capacity)*EachNodePrice / Node Price

Warning:
1. This is a estimate data by compute resource.
2. If there is "No Data", please wait for at least one hour.

targets.expr:
sum(
((sum(sum(node_current_price{chargeType!="IDC"} / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"})) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"})) * 3600
or
sum(pod_current_price{exported_namespace=~"$Namespace"}) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) * 3600
)

((sum(sum(node_current_price{chargeType="IDC"} / on (node) group_left max(kube_node_status_capacity_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by (node)) by (node) * on(node) group_right kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"})) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"})) * 3600

panels.title: Price per core-hour

panels.description:
CPU Usage / CPU Request.

If this Utilization is too low, may be your app is idle.

If this Utilization > 100%, your app is oversold.

targets.expr: (sum (rate (container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}[2m])) / (sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"}) )) > 0 or vector(0)

sum(sum (rate (container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!=""}[1m])) by (node) * on(node) max(kube_node_labels{label_ack_aliyun_com!=""}) by (node))

/

/

sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace=~"$Namespace", namespace!="",container !="",container!="POD"}) / sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics",namespace=~"$Namespace"})

panels.title: CPU/Memory Resource Usage Trend

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"})

sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024

sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName)

(vector($cost_allocation_method) - 1 == 0) or
(vector($cost_allocation_method) == -1)*vector(-1)*(1-$CPUWeight/100) or
(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node)))/(sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="cpu"}) by (node))+sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{job="_kube-state-metrics"})/sum(max(kube_node_status_capacity{job="_kube-state-metrics",resource="memory"}) by (node))))

#ECI成本
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(label_replace(pod_current_price, "namespace", "$1", "exported_namespace", "(.*)")) by (exported_pod, namespace) or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics", namespace=~"$Namespace"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

# GPU节点
+ on(namespace) group_left
sum(max(node_current_price) by (node) * on (node) group_right label_replace(label_replace(sum(sum(floor(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_CONTAINER_MEM_ALLOCATED{NamespaceName=~"$Namespace"}[29s]))) by (NodeName,NamespaceName,AllocateMode,PodName) / on(NodeName) group_left sum(max_over_time(DCGM_CUSTOM_DEV_FB_TOTAL{}[29s])) by (NodeName)) by (NodeName, NamespaceName), "node", "$1", "NodeName", "(.*)"), "namespace", "$1", "NamespaceName", "(.*)") * on(node) group_left kube_node_labels{label_aliyun_accelerator_nvidia_name!=""} or max(kube_namespace_labels{job="_kube-state-metrics"}) by(namespace) * 0 ) by (namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

)

/

sum(
sum(node_current_price) by (pod, namespace) * ($__interval_ms/1000)

or
sum(max(pod_current_price{}) by (exported_pod, exported_namespace)) * ($__interval_ms/1000)
)

panels.title: Pod Resource Usage Ranking-Sorted by CPU Usage

panels.description:
Sort by WasteRate.
WasteRate = 1 - CPUUtilization

CPUUtilization = CPUUsage / CPURequest

MemroyUtilization = MemoryUsage / MemroyRequest
